name: GitHub
description: Typed desktop plugin port of the StackStorm GitHub integration pack, with manifest-defined actions and trigger metadata for safer agent execution.

fields.label: Access Token
fields.description: GitHub personal access token or GitHub App installation token. Optional for public read-only calls.

fields.label: Deployment Environment
fields.description: Expected deployment environment for the StackStorm-style deployment_event workflow.

fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: Optional GitHub Enterprise API base URL, for example https://github.example.com/api/v3.

actions.title: Add Comment
actions.description: Add a comment to an issue or pull request.

fields.label: Owner
fields.description: GitHub user or organization that owns the repository.

fields.label: Repository
fields.description: Repository name.

actions.title: Add Commit Status
actions.description: Create a commit status for a SHA.

fields.label: Owner
fields.description: GitHub user or organization that owns the repository.

fields.label: Repository
fields.description: Repository name.

actions.title: Add Team Membership
actions.description: Add a user to an organization team.

actions.title: Check Deployment Environment
actions.description: Validate that an incoming deployment environment matches the expected target environment.

actions.title: Create Deployment
actions.description: Create a repository deployment.

fields.label: Owner
fields.description: GitHub user or organization that owns the repository.

fields.label: Repository
fields.description: Repository name.

actions.title: Create Deployment Status
actions.description: Post a deployment status update.

fields.label: Owner
fields.description: GitHub user or organization that owns the repository.

fields.label: Repository
fields.description: Repository name.

actions.title: Deployment Event
actions.description: Process a GitHub deployment event and install or update a local desktop plugin when the deployment environment matches.

fields.label: Repository Full Name
fields.description: The full repo path, for example org/repository.

fields.label: Repository Name
fields.description: Repository name.

fields.label: Deploy Ref
fields.description: The branch, tag, or ref to deploy.

fields.label: Deployment Environment
fields.description: Target environment carried by the deployment event.

fields.label: Deployment SHA
fields.description: Commit SHA for the deployment.

fields.label: Deployment Description
fields.description: Human description of the deployment.

fields.label: Deployment ID
fields.description: GitHub deployment identifier.

fields.label: Repository SSH URL
fields.description: Repository SSH URL from the deployment payload.

fields.label: Creator
fields.description: Login that created the deployment. Desktop uses the configured plugin token for follow-up status updates.

fields.label: Deployment Payload
fields.description: Additional payload information from GitHub.

actions.description: Create a new repository file.

actions.title: Store OAuth Token

actions.description: Replace branch protection rules for a branch.

fields.description: Branch protection payload shaped like GitHub's REST API body.

actions.title: Update File
actions.description: Update an existing repository file.

fields.description: GitHub user or organization that owns the repository.

fields.label: Repository
fields.description: Repository name.

triggers.title: Repository Event
triggers.description: Poll or webhook-driven repository event ingestion modeled after the StackStorm repository sensor.

fields.label: Repositories
fields.description: List of owner/repository pairs to watch. Mirrors repository_sensor.repositories.

fields.label: Event Type Whitelist
fields.description: Repository event types to ingest, for example PushEvent or ReleaseEvent.

fields.label: History Count
fields.description: Maximum number of previously seen events to fetch during poll reconciliation.

triggers.title: Deployment Event Webhook
triggers.description: Webhook-driven deployment event trigger modeled after StackStorm's deployment_event rule.

fields.label: Environment
fields.description: Expected deployment environment used to route or filter deployment webhooks.
